sourcesContent:
import { Button, Container, Dialog, DialogActions, DialogContent, DialogContentText, Grid, useMediaQuery, useTheme } from '@material-ui/core'
import React, { useState } from 'react'
import ClassroomCards from '../components/ClassroomCards'
import mathbg from '../images/mathbg.png'
import webdev from '../images/webdevelopment.png'
import webdes from '../images/webdesign.png'
import js from '../images/javascript.png'
import arduino from '../images/arduino.png'
import engr from '../images/engineering.png'
import graphicdesign from '../images/graphicdesign.png'
import py from '../images/python.png'
import arts from '../images/arts.png'
import Layout from '../components/Layout'



export default function TeacherDashboard() {
    const theme = useTheme();
    const fullScreen = useMediaQuery(theme.breakpoints.down('sm'));

    
    const [openDialog, setOpenDialog] = useState(false);
    const handleClickOpen = () => {
        setOpenDialog(true);
    };

    const handleClose = () => {
        setOpenDialog(false);
    };

    const [classrooms, setClassrooms] = useState([
        { title: 'Web Development', body: 'MWF (7:00AM-10:00AM)', section: 'BSCpE-3A', imagebg: webdev, id: 1 },
        { title: 'Web Design', body: 'TTh (1:00PM-5:00PM)', section: 'BSCpE-3B', imagebg: webdes, id: 2 },
        { title: 'JavaScript Programming', body: 'MWF (7:00AM-10:00AM)', section: 'BSCpE-3A', imagebg: js, id: 3 },
        { title: 'Calculus', body: 'TTh (1:00PM-5:00PM)', section: 'BSCE-3A', imagebg: mathbg, id: 4 },
        { title: 'Arduino', body: 'MWF (7:00AM-10:00AM)', section: 'BSCE-3A', imagebg: arduino, id: 5 },
        { title: 'Numerical Methods', body: 'TTh (1:00PM-5:00PM)', section: 'BSCE-3A', imagebg: mathbg, id: 6 },
        { title: 'Engineering Basics', body: 'MWF (7:00AM-10:00AM)', section: 'BSCpE-3A', imagebg: engr, id: 7 },
        { title: 'Graphic Designing', body: 'TTh (1:00PM-5:00PM)', section: 'BSCpE-3B', imagebg: graphicdesign, id: 8 },
        { title: 'Python Programming', body: 'MWF (7:00AM-10:00AM)', section: 'BSCpE-3A', imagebg: py, id: 9 },
        { title: 'Art App', body: 'TTh (1:00PM-5:00PM)', section: 'BSCpE-3B', imagebg: arts, id: 10 },
    ])


    return (
        <>
            <Container>
                <Layout sx={{display: 'none'}} open={openDialog} />
                <Grid container spacing={7}>
                    {classrooms.map(subject => (
                        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} lg={3} key={subject.id}>
                            <ClassroomCards subject={subject} />
                        </Grid>
                    ))}
                </Grid>
                <Dialog fullScreen={fullScreen} open={openDialog} onClose={handleClose}>
                    <DialogContent>
                        <DialogContentText>
                            Are you sure you want to post this?
                        </DialogContentText>
                    </DialogContent>
                    <DialogActions>
                        <Button autoFocus onClick={handleClose} color="primary">
                            Cancel
                        </Button>
                        <Button onClick={handleClose} color="primary" autoFocus>
                            Confirm
                        </Button>
                    </DialogActions>
                </Dialog>
            </Container>
        </>
    )
}
